contentPattern.structure: product screenshot + category eyebrow + product title + description + technology-icon strip + 'Read more' CTA

suitableFor: product / solution showcase grids with a large screenshot per item
dark image-led cards pairing a title, description and technology icon strip
offering grids that end each card with a 'Read more' link
notSuitableFor: full-width stacked light service rows with tiny icons (use cards-service-detail)
icon + title + description feature grids without large screenshots (use cards-services)
portfolio image tiles with overlaid label only (use cards-portfolio-listing)
